text:
Once upon a time, there was a beautiful island kingdom far, far away. In the kingdom, there lived a clever little fox named Fredrick. Fredrick had a big curiosity that drove him out into the forest every day.

One sunny morning, while hunting for breakfast, Fredrick happened upon a peculiar tree. It was unlike anything he had ever seen before—it swayed gently in the breeze like it had eyes. Intrigued, Fredrick approached it.

As he climbed to meet its lofty branches, something wonderful happened. The tree sang a song that sounded like a chorus of wind chimes dancing to a subtle melody.

Fredrick listened, enchanted. That was the last thing he noticed, though.

From the tree, a tiny voice whispered. "Fredrick, if you eat this delicious-looking fruit..."

Fredrick leapt down. "What fruits grow here?"

The tree chuckled softly. "Oh, just this one. I've never seen anyone eat it, but it's really tasty
